use_cases: Displaying loading states during barcode scanning operations in retail applications
Showing progress feedback while processing product lookups in inventory systems
Visual loading indicator for scanning features in warehouse management apps
Animated feedback component during data synchronization in POS systems
Loading animation for any application feature involving scanning or processing
ai_summary: A visually striking animated loader component featuring text with a horizontal scanning effect that sweeps across the content. The component displays the word 'Barcode' with a glowing red/pink scan line animation, supporting hover state transitions and dark mode. Perfect for retail, e-commerce, or dev-tool interfaces requiring visual feedback during scanning operations.
